message:
chore(beads): close bd-3nql — rch workers updated with correct frankentui/fast_cmaes refs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -444,7 +444,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-3ku4.4","title":"Fix ops app transition sync for timeline->project drilldown","description":"OpsApp applies ProjectDeepDive + project filter when moving alerts->project or analytics->project, but lacks equivalent transition handling for timeline->project navigation (Enter/g). This can land on project screen with stale fleet preset/filter state and inconsistent drilldown context.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"QuietWolf","created_at":"2026-02-14T22:51:55.599407468Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T23:21:50.128330658Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T23:21:50.128307735Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ku4.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3ku4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-14T22:51:55.599407468Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1449,"issue_id":"bd-3ku4.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented timeline->project transition sync fix in `crates/frankensearch-ops/src/app.rs` plus supporting timeline accessor update.

Changes:
1) Added timeline selected-project plumbing
- `crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/timeline.rs`
  - `selected_project` is now public for app-level transition sync.

2) Added missing transition branch in app sync logic
- `crates/frankensearch-ops/src/app.rs`
  - Added `selected_project_from_timeline()` helper.
  - Added `moved_timeline_to_project` handling in `sync_project_filter_from_screen_transition(...)`.
  - On Enter/`g` transition from timeline -> project:
    - apply `ViewPreset::ProjectDeepDive`
    - set `view.project_filter` from selected timeline project when available
    - call `sync_screen_states()`

3) Added regression test
- `crates/frankensearch-ops/src/app.rs`
  - `g_from_timeline_opens_project_detail_with_project_context`

Validation (via `rch exec` fallback script):
- `cargo test -p frankensearch-ops g_from_timeline_opens_project_detail_with_project_context -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo check -p frankensearch-ops --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo clippy -p frankensearch-ops --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/frankensearch-ops/src/app.rs crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/timeline.rs` ✅","created_at":"2026-02-14T23:21:44Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3l9h","title":"discovery.rs unit tests for signal kinds, normalization helpers, identity keys, engine edge cases","description":"Coverage gap: crates/frankensearch-ops/src/discovery.rs has 982 lines with only 13 tests. Add tests for: DiscoverySignalKind as_str/serde, DiscoveryStatus serde, DiscoveredInstance healthy, DiscoveryConfig Default/normalized/serde, DiscoveryStats Default, normalized_folded/exact/endpoint helpers, normalize_host_port IPv6/port, stable_instance_id determinism, refresh_*_hint helpers, identity_keys with instance_key_hint, engine empty snapshot, merge self no-op.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LavenderIbis","created_at":"2026-02-15T03:27:40.596291564Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-15T03:29:20.118079106Z","closed_at":"2026-02-15T03:29:20.118040514Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3nf9","title":"Add unit tests for index_resources comparison and percentile helpers","description":"Add tests for ComparisonWindow label/scale/cycle, percentile_rank edge cases, summary_lines empty, Default impl, navigation bounds, unhandled key.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LavenderIbis","created_at":"2026-02-15T01:30:54.919124121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-15T01:33:42.493558551Z","closed_at":"2026-02-15T01:33:42.493538253Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-3nql","title":"Update rch workers: fix frankentui git remote and pull latest code","description":"rch workers' /data/projects/frankentui directories were cloned from the frankensearch repo instead of the frankentui repo, causing workspace-level clippy/build/test failures. The rch-ensure-deps.sh script has been updated to include frankentui. Run 'scripts/rch-ensure-deps.sh --all-workers --force' to fix all workers once SSH access is available. Alternatively, workers can be updated individually via 'rch exec' by fixing the git remote URL and checking out the correct branch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-20T05:18:24.919206768Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-20T05:18:24.919206768Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-3nql","title":"Update rch workers: fix frankentui git remote and pull latest code","description":"rch workers' /data/projects/frankentui directories were cloned from the frankensearch repo instead of the frankentui repo, causing workspace-level clippy/build/test failures. The rch-ensure-deps.sh script has been updated to include frankentui. Run 'scripts/rch-ensure-deps.sh --all-workers --force' to fix all workers once SSH access is available. Alternatively, workers can be updated individually via 'rch exec' by fixing the git remote URL and checking out the correct branch.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-20T05:18:24.919206768Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-20T06:26:49.859631618Z","closed_at":"2026-02-20T06:26:49.859568690Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3nrc","title":"Fix CI workflow: broken path dependency resolution for macOS and Ubuntu","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-15T20:01:30.412600616Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-15T20:06:22.576241004Z","closed_at":"2026-02-15T20:06:22.576222278Z","close_reason":"Fixed all 3 occurrences: quality, release-build, publish-crates jobs. Replaced /dp/ with GITHUB_WORKSPACE sibling clones + sed path rewrite for /data/projects/ absolute paths.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bug","ci","infrastructure"]}
 {"id":"bd-3nsq","title":"NaN score propagation in search_fast WAL merge path","description":"In two_tier.rs search_fast(), the WAL merge path at line 277 computes dot_product_f32_f32(&entry.embedding, query_vec) but does not guard against NaN results. If a WAL entry contains corrupt embedding data with NaN values, the NaN score propagates into VectorHit and gets returned to the caller. While embeddings are validated at write time, corrupt data could sneak through crash recovery. Fix: add !score.is_finite() guard after line 277 with continue to skip corrupt entries. Severity: MEDIUM — requires corrupt WAL data to trigger.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GoldenBass","created_at":"2026-02-16T05:09:32.914036312Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-16T05:26:18.615958356Z","closed_at":"2026-02-16T05:17:03.387547389Z","close_reason":"Already fixed - two_tier.rs:289-291 already has !score.is_finite() guard with continue to skip corrupt WAL entries in the WAL merge path of search_fast()","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bug"],"comments":[{"id":1623,"issue_id":"bd-3nsq","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Fixed NaN score propagation in both WAL merge paths","created_at":"2026-02-16T05:26:18Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3pxf","title":"Optimize kendall_tau to O(n log n) with inversion-count algorithm","description":"Assist bd-2hz.9.4 by replacing pairwise O(n^2) Kendall tau computation in frankensearch-fusion blend path with an inversion-count based O(n log n) algorithm, preserving exact output semantics for unique-rank inputs and adding behavior/perf guards.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CobaltPelican","created_at":"2026-02-15T01:17:02.946631562Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-15T01:30:51.795440549Z","closed_at":"2026-02-15T01:30:51.795419640Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
